title: Snowy Tents
description: Adds cozy snowy tents to snow biomes, filled with stuff to discover
body:
This mod adds small snowy tents that spawn in Minecraft's snowy biomes.

Inside the tents, you can rest, craft items, and even find some loot to help you on your journey.

The loot inside focuses on helping you in snowy biomes, including items like leather boots and shovels.

![Tent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95a7040cf3c40cbfba8f80b9f7362a7207b2a105.jpeg)
![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b97338a27196d5360059af85d6be4a4ea6b8d431.jpeg)
